label: Bafflework Warehouse
description: Bafflework Warehouse functions as a bulk-storage hall built directly into Brineshade Terminator City’s fused basalt platforms, its walls bonded with salt-cement to resist the planet’s measured tidal stresses. Tiered light baffles and louvered panels line the interior, cutting Saltharrow’s hard glare into controlled bands that preserve visibility along marked aisles. Basalt ribs support high bays fitted with bracketed gantries and standardized anchor points for modular pallet frames. The floor is scored with permanent corridor markings aligned to the city’s charted transit routes and beacon-referenced loading schedules.
